ogTitle: Glen Waverley vs Glenaire: Climate Safety

heading: Glen Waverley vs Glenaire — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Glen Waverley, Victoria and Glenaire, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Glenaire has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Glen Waverley (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Glen Waverley or Glenaire safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Glen Waverley has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Glenaire scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Glen Waverley scores 57/100 for bushfire risk. Glenaire scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Glen Waverley or Glenaire?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Glenaire has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
